subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! His honour Muhammad-Qabli-Taqi, upon him be My glory, hath, out of his love for God, departed from his native land with purpose [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی جناب محمد قبل تقی علیه بهائی از وطن ظاهر لحب الله حرکت نموده قاصدا
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @thankfulness; gratitude, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
